description_long: This object is a dark-colored machine gun with a long, cylindrical barrel and a prominent drum magazine mounted beneath the receiver. The body features angular, industrial lines and a compact, skeletal stock at the rear, likely made of metal. The handguard and receiver are integrated, with subtle texturing and paneling visible along the length. The drum magazine is centrally located and appears robust, suggesting a high ammunition capacity. The stock is minimalistic, with a squared-off design and no visible padding. The overall finish is matte, with a utilitarian appearance suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A dark, matte-finished machine gun with a long barrel, drum magazine, and skeletal metal stock. The design is angular and utilitarian, with industrial detailing.
description_view_0: The machine gun is seen from the front, showing the narrow barrel and the symmetrical alignment of the handguard and stock.
description_view_1: A side profile reveals the full length of the barrel, the large drum magazine beneath the receiver, and the skeletal stock extending rearward.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the squared-off stock and the alignment of the receiver and barrel, with the drum magazine partially visible.
description_view_3: The opposite side profile mirrors view 1, showing the drum magazine, angular receiver, and minimalistic stock.
